title: Oaklands Farm Solar Park Order 2025: correction of errors, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State to make corrections to the Oaklands Farm Solar Park Order 2025  Date of decision  8 October 2025  Company/location   Oaklands Farm Solar LimitedLondon   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008/Correction of errors, Planning Act 2008 "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
